landing.heroSubtitle: Classroom centralizes your school's administration — registration, classes, grades, schedules, and communication — in an interface built for teams on the ground.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything a school needs day to day
landing.featuresDesc: From school setup to academic follow-up, Classroom brings together the essential tools to structure your school management.
landing.feature1Desc: Create your school step by step: identity, location, contacts, and admin account.
landing.feature2Desc: Manage headcount, classes, and profiles from a structured dashboard.
landing.feature3Desc: Enter assessments and view report cards for each student or class.
landing.feature4Desc: Organize courses, rooms, and time slots in one place.
landing.feature5Desc: View routes and stops for school pickup.
landing.feature6Desc: Parents, students, and teachers access their information securely.
landing.stepsTitle: From registration to dashboard in minutes
landing.stepsDesc: A linear flow without endless forms — with Back and Continue at each step.
landing.step1Desc: Enter the name, type, and school system in a few minutes.
landing.step2Desc: Add the address and place the school on the map.
landing.step3Desc: Phone, official email, and school leader.
landing.step4Desc: Sign in and start managing classes, grades, and services.
landing.modulesTitle: A complete ecosystem for your school
landing.modulesDesc: Start with essentials, then enable modules as you need them.
landing.ctaBandSubtitle: Create your admin account and set up your school today. No complex installation — everything is online.
landing.footerSecondary: Built for Francophone schools in Africa and beyond

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Test mode: choose your role to access the dashboard.
login.roleHint: Determines which dashboard is shown after sign-in.
login.visualTitle: Manage your school in one place
login.visualDesc: Classes, schedules, grades, and communication — all centralized in Classroom.

school.stepSchoolSubtitle: School name, type, and education system.
school.stepLocationSubtitle: Country, city, district, and school address.
school.stepGpsSubtitle: Place the school on the map to help transport and services.
school.stepContactsSubtitle: Official contact details and school leader.
school.stepPresentationSubtitle: Website, logo, headcount, and programs offered.
school.stepExtendedSubtitle: These fields are optional — you can complete them later.
school.stepExtendedHint: All fields in this step are optional.
school.stepAccountSubtitle: Final step: your dashboard login credentials.
school.stepAccountHint: You will use this email and password to manage your school.
